remoteAccess.title: Remote access
remoteAccess.description: Reach this hub from outside your local network — no port forwarding, end-to-end encrypted via WebRTC.

section.title: Connection
section.description: Status of the peer-to-peer tunnel and active browser sessions.

stateDescription.idle: Waiting for a name claim before connecting to the coordinator.
stateDescription.reconnecting: Lost connection to the coordinator — retrying with backoff.
stateDescription.closed: Disconnected. Click "Forget" or restart the hub to reconnect.

claim.help: Pick a unique name. First-come, first-served — once claimed, no one else can use it on this coordinator.

forget.title: Disconnect
forget.description: Releases the name on the coordinator and removes the local bearer token. You can claim the same name again later.
forget.confirmDescription: The name will become available for anyone else to claim. You'll lose remote access to this hub until you claim a name again.

time.title: Date & time
time.description: Set the timezone Brika uses for scheduling, and pick how clocks are formatted throughout the app.

hub.title: Hub maintenance
hub.description: Check for updates and control the running hub process.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose your preferred color theme and mode

theme.title: Color theme
theme.description: Tap a theme to apply it across the app.

mode.title: Color mode
mode.description: Use light, dark, or follow your operating system.

custom.title: Custom themes
custom.description: Themes you've crafted with the theme builder.
custom.empty: No custom themes yet. Create one to make Brika your own.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: Set the timezone for your Brika instance. This affects all time-related operations.

timeFormat.title: Time format
timeFormat.description: How clocks and timestamps are displayed across the app.

location.title: Hub Location
location.description: Set the physical location of your hub. Plugins with location permission will use this data.
location.emptyHint: Search for an address or detect your location to get started.

update.title: Updates
update.description: Check for updates and manage hub version

hubControl.title: Hub Control
hubControl.description: Restart or stop the Brika hub process
